item.title: Medline Industries, LP: Medline Convenience Kits: 1) BASIC NERVE BLOCK TRAY W/LINEN, Model Number:PAIN0150C Recall
item.product: Medline Convenience Kits: 1) BASIC NERVE BLOCK TRAY W/LINEN, Model Number:PAIN0150C
item.summary: Medline has identified issues related to calibration of the equipment used to sterilize and package the devices. All products were exposed to the validated sterilization and packaging cycles; however, the identified calibration issues have the potential to impact the sterility assurance level (SAL) of the Recalled Products. Product details: Medline Convenience Kits: 1) BASIC NERVE BLOCK TRAY W/LINEN, Model Number:PAIN0150C
item.payoutAmount: Refund, replacement, correction, or disposal if stated by the official notice
